title: axonopus repens
intro: Axonopus repens, also known as the broad-leaved grass or broad-leaved paspalum, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties, which are believed to help soothe various health issues. The health benefits of Axonopus repens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. Axonopus repens can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and poultices, which are made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with other herbal ingredients.
